title: [BUG] Font information missing for some cells
author: PRR24
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Font information may be unavailable for cells that creator has not formatted.

Lib version: 4.4

## Steps To Reproduce

* Create new Excel file
* Type any word on A1
* Save
* Load with ExcelJS

## The expected behaviour:

Font info is available for cell A1

## Actual behaviour:

Font info is unknown for cell, row or column.

comments.author: PRR24
comments.body:
After looking around in code, this is what I found:
* Default font and corresponding default style is loaded correctly by StylesXform.
* This info is ignored during reconcile process, assigning styles only to entitites (like cells) with styleId and destroyed in the end of the process.

I think this is incorrect. So instead of
```const style = model.styleId && options.styles && options.styles.getStyleModel(model.styleId);```
it should read
```const style = options.styles && options.styles.getStyleModel(model.styleId || 0);```

Please note that currently options.styles[0] remains inaccessible, even if model.styleId would be explicitly set to 0.

Hope it helps.
